final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, family lifestyle
Primary request: warm family gathering around a round Chinese hotpot table, family members raising glasses in celebration
Scene/backdrop: cozy dining room with walls covered in family photos and memorabilia, traditional Chinese home interior
Subject: multi-generational Chinese family (grandparents, parents, children) seated around a round table, smiling faces, genuine laughter, hands holding glasses mid-toast
Style/medium: documentary-style photography, candid family portrait
Composition/framing: medium-wide shot capturing the whole table and all family members, eye-level perspective
Lighting/mood: warm yellow ambient lighting from overhead fixture and table lamp, soft glowing atmosphere, steam rising from hotpot creating hazy warmth, intimate and joyful mood
Color palette: warm yellows and ambers, rich wooden browns, red accents from hotpot and decor, muted wall tones
Materials/textures: steaming hotpot broth with floating ingredients, glossy ceramic bowls, wooden round table surface, printed photographs on wall, fabric textures of casual home clothing
Constraints: keep the warm cozy atmosphere, ensure all family members appear engaged and happy, preserve the round table composition central to Chinese family dining
Avoid: cold sterile lighting, awkward poses, empty background, over-processed colors, watermark
